institution.name: The University of Texas at Dallas

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas at Dallas rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.3k → $11.8k).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Texas at Dallas are 25% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.2k vs $54.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The University of Texas at Dallas rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (52.3% → 59.5%).
